headline: Exxon Mobil Coral Norte LNG Win And What It Means For Valuation
summary: Exxon Mobil (NYSE:XOM) has secured a major EPCIC contract for the Coral Norte LNG project offshore Mozambique. The award, valued at more than €1b, is tied to a joint venture with Eni and CNPC. The deal expands Exxon Mobil's global LNG footprint beyond North America and deepens its presence in offshore Mozambique. For investors watching NYSE:XOM, this contract adds another large LNG project to the company’s portfolio and reinforces its role in global gas supply. LNG has been a key focus for...

headline: Trump Has Predicted An Iran Deal 38 Times Since March: Prediction Markets Say It Won't Happen Soon
